title: Swamp Dogg Gets His Pool Painted
original_title: Swamp Dogg Gets His Pool Painted
overview: Legendary musician Swamp Dogg, alongside housemates Moogstar and Guitar Shorty, has transformed his home into an artistic playground. Together they navigate the tumultuous music industry, and forge a unique and inspiring path across time and space.
